input.pr_body: Adding function that allow to substract a multivalue from a multivalue, to round out the mv functions.

ground_truth.diff:
diff --git a/docs/changelog/141895.yaml b/docs/changelog/141895.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..d305e90b35bb4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/docs/changelog/141895.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+area: ES|QL
+issues: []
+pr: 141895
+summary: ESQL `mv_difference` function
+type: feature
diff --git a/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/description/mv_difference.md b/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/description/mv_difference.md
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..e8df6b8a5f7b4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/description/mv_difference.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+% This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.
+
+## Description
+
+Returns the values that appear in the first field, except those that appear in the second. Returns `null` if the first expression is null (nothing to remove) or the value of the first field if the second is null.
+
diff --git a/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/examples/mv_difference.md b/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/examples/mv_difference.md
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..f54c3787fad0c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/examples/mv_difference.md
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+% This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.
+
+## Example
+
+```esql
+ROW values = ["a", "b", "c"], element = "a"
+| EVAL result = mv_difference(values, element)
+```
+
+| values:keyword | element:keyword | result:keyword |
+| --- | --- | --- |
+| [a, b, c] | a | [b, c] |
+
+
diff --git a/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/layout/mv_difference.md b/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/layout/mv_difference.md
new file mode 100644

--- /dev/null
+++ b/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/layout/mv_difference.md
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+% This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.
+
+```{applies_to}
+stack: preview 9.4.0
+serverless: preview
+```
+
+## Syntax
+
+:::{image} ../../../images/functions/mv_difference.svg

+
+
+:::{include} ../parameters/mv_difference.md

+
+:::{include} ../description/mv_difference.md

diff --git a/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/parameters/mv_difference.md b/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/parameters/mv_difference.md
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..0e1e5ccd44209
--- /dev/null
+++ b/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/parameters/mv_difference.md
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+% This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.
+
+## Parameters
+
+`field1`
+:   Expression that can be null, a single value, or multiple values. If null, the function returns null.
+
+`field2`
+:   Expression that can be null, a single value, or multiple values. If null, the function returns field1.
+
diff --git a/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/types/mv_difference.md b/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/types/mv_difference.md
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..c8474003610d7
--- /dev/null
+++ b/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/_snippets/functions/types/mv_difference.md
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+% This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.
+
+## Supported types
+
+| field1 | field2 | result |
+| --- | --- | --- |
+| boolean | boolean | boolean |
+| cartesian_point | cartesian_point | cartesian_point |
+| cartesian_shape | cartesian_shape | cartesian_shape |
+| date | date | date |
+| date_nanos | date_nanos | date_nanos |
+| double | double | double |
+| geo_point | geo_point | geo_point |
+| geo_shape | geo_shape | geo_shape |
+| geohash | geohash | geohash |
+| geohex | geohex | geohex |
+| geotile | geotile | geotile |
+| integer | integer | integer |
+| ip | ip | ip |
+| keyword | keyword | keyword |
+| keyword | text | keyword |
+| long | long | long |
+| text | keyword | keyword |
+| text | text | keyword |
+| unsigned_long | unsigned_long | unsigned_long |
+| version | version | version |
+

input.pr_body:
# Backport

This will backport the following commits from `main` to `9.2`:
 - [Add cancellation support to IndicesRequestCache (#141708)](https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch/pull/141708)

<!--- Backport version: 10.2.0 -->

### Questions ?
Please refer to the [Backport tool documentation](https://github.com/sorenlouv/backport)
This PR adds some helpers and a skeleton to be used in the full maybeTakeSnapshot() method, which will be implemented in a subsequent PR
